data.title: Quiddity Engineering appoints Ken Rogers, PE, CFM, as Vice President in San Antonio office. He brings 25 years of experience in Public Infrastructure.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 22, 2026, Quiddity Engineering welcomed Ken Rogers, PE, CFM as the newest Vice President in its expanding Public Infrastructure practice. Rogers brings 25 years of expertise in intricate drainage and roadway design to the firm, enhancing its capabilities in this sector.

data.title: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR) discloses 2025 tax treatment of dividend distributions in Los Angeles.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 22, 2026, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust concentrating on developing value through investments in industrial properties in Southern California, announced their latest ventures. The company, known as Rexford Industrial, operates in infill areas of Southern California and shows a commitment to driving growth and productivity in the region.

data.title: Streamex Corp. (NASDAQ: STEX) announces public offering of common stock to repay debts & for general purposes.
data.description: Winter Park, Florida on January 22, 2026 - Streamex Corp. ("Streamex" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: STEX), known for its expertise in institutional-grade tokenization of real-world assets and commodity-backed stablecoins such as GLDY, revealed plans to launch an underwritten public offering of common stock. The Company will offer all the shares of common stock. The offering's completion is dependent on market conditions, and there is no guarantee on its timing, size, or terms. The Company aims to utilize the net proceeds from the offering to clear prior debts as per its financing strategy and for general corporate purposes, including working capital.

data.title: INEOS Grenadier opens first dealership in Arizona at INEOS Grenadier Arrowhead on Jan. 22, 2026, with grand opening event on Jan. 29.
data.description: A new INEOS Grenadier dealership, named INEOS Grenadier Arrowhead, is scheduled to debut in Glendale, Arizona. The grand opening event is planned for Thursday, January 29, 2026. This marks a notable expansion for the brand in the region.

data.title: Amerant Bancorp Inc. declared $0.09 per share dividend & new share repurchase program. Board of Directors approved.
data.description: A financial institution based in Coral Gables, Florida, known as Amerant Bancorp Inc. (NYSE: AMTB), revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.09 per share for holders of Amerant common stock. The designated payment date for this dividend is scheduled for February 27, 2026, with shareholders listed on the books as of February 13, 2026, being eligible to receive it. Additionally, the Board has granted authorization for a new share repurchase initiative named the “2026 Repurchase Program,” enabling Amerant to buy back shares intermittently.

data.title: Legato Merger Corp. IV's IPO priced at $10/unit, offering 20,000,000 units totalling $200,000,000. Trading starts Jan 23.
data.description: Legato Merger Corp. IV disclosed on January 22, 2026, that it has set the price for its initial public offering of 20,000,000 units at $10.00 each. These units are scheduled to be traded on the NYSE American Market starting from January 23, 2026, under the ticker symbol “LEGO U.” Each unit includes one ordinary share and one-third of a redeemable warrant. The whole warrant allows the holder to purchase one ordinary share at $11.50 per share, subject to adjustments. Only complete warrants are exercisable and will be available for trading. Once trading separately commences, it is anticipated that the ordinary shares and redeemable warrants will be listed on NYSE American with the symbols “LEGO” and “LEGO WS,” respectively.

data.title: GameStop's 'infinite money glitch' discovered, CEO makes massive insider buys, stock (GME) soars.
data.description: This week, GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) made headlines for two major developments. Firstly, an "infinite money glitch" was discovered in its stores, where customers could exploit a trade-in loophole for the new Nintendo Switch 2, allowing them to generate store credit. The glitch involved purchasing the console for $414.99 and then trading it in with a pre-owned game to activate a promotional multiplier, increasing the trade-in value. Additionally, CEO Ryan Cohen made significant insider buys, leading to a surge in GME stock price. The full story, including charts and price actions, can be found on financial news site Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. declared a $0.755712 per common unit distribution for Q4 2025, payable on Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (NASDAQ:DMLP) revealed its fourth quarter 2025 cash distribution of $0.755712 per common unit. This distribution covers the three-month period concluding on December 31, 2025, and will be paid out on February 12, 2026, to common unitholders recorded as of February 2, 2026.

data.title: Trump sues JPMorgan for $5B over debanking, blames Biden admin for banks' actions, not execs.
data.description: The former president attributed banks cutting ties with him to the actions of the Biden administration, not the bank executives.

data.title: CPR Foundation hosts inaugural Charity Golf Tournament in Florida at Trump International Golf Club, sold-out event.
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida on January 22, 2026, the CPR Foundation organized its inaugural Charity Golf Tournament at the renowned Trump International Golf Club. The event was sponsored by Corcoran and was entirely sold out, marking a significant achievement for the foundation.

data.title: Midland States Bancorp announces $5.1M loss in Q4 2025, compared to $5.3M income in Q3 2025 and $33M loss in Q4 2024.
data.description: In Effingham, Illinois, on January 22, 2026, Midland States Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: MSBI) disclosed a fourth-quarter financial report. The Company revealed a net loss available to common shareholders totaling $5.1 million, equivalent to $0.24 per diluted share, for Q4 2025. This marked a significant change from the prior quarter, where there was a net income of $5.3 million, also at $0.24 per diluted share in Q3 2025. In comparison to the same period the year before, which saw a net loss of $33.0 million, or $1.52 per diluted share in Q4 2024, the current results indicate a notable shift in performance.

data.title: PeopleGrove introduces new reporting feature to help universities show alumni engagement impact, following CASE guidelines.
data.description: PeopleGrove, a prominent SaaS platform in higher education engagement and experiential learning, has introduced CASE-aligned reporting features in its Engagement Hub. This new functionality aligns with the CASE Insights on Alumni Engagement model. Higher education institutions can now access simplified report generation through PeopleGrove, streamlining processes and providing insight-driven experiences for advancement teams. This enhancement aims to improve efficiency and effectiveness in alumni engagement strategies.

data.title: ATS Corp (TSX: ATS) will announce Q3 results before markets open on Feb 4, 2026. Earnings call at 8:30 am Eastern time.
data.description: ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) based in Cambridge, Ontario, will be revealing its financial performance for the third quarter concluded on December 28, 2025. The disclosure is set to occur before trading commences on Wednesday, February 04, 2026. A conference call and webcast featuring management's insights for the quarter, along with a Q&A session with analysts, will take place at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Those interested can join the listen-only webcast at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/136.
